---
title: "R Notebook"
---

```{r load RMA data}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(leaflet)

corn <- read.csv("RMACountyYieldsReport-115.csv")

corn <- corn |>
  rename(
    commodity_code    = Commodity.Code,
    commodity_name    = Commodity.Name,
    state_code        = State.Code,
    state_name        = State.Name,
    state_abbr        = State.Abbreviation,
    county_code       = County.Code,
    county_name       = County.Name,
    irr_code          = Irrigation.Practice.Code,
    irr_practice      = Irrigation.Practice.Name,
    year              = Yield.Year,
    yield             = Yield.Amount
) 
```



```{r filter to midwest states}
corn_states <- corn |>
  filter(trimws(state_abbr) %in% c("ND", "SD", "NE", "KS",
    "MN", "IA", "MO", "WI", "IL", "KY", "TN", "MI", "IN", "OH"
  )) |>
  mutate(
    state_abbr = trimws(state_abbr),
    FIPS = sprintf("%02d%03d", state_code, county_code)
  ) %>%
  select(FIPS, state_abbr, year, yield)
```

```{r}
names(corn_states)
```


```{r}
library(tigris)

counties <- counties(cb = TRUE)

corn_map <- counties |>
  left_join(corn_states, by = c("GEOID" = "FIPS")) |>
  st_transform(4326) %>%
  select(GEOID, NAME, state_abbr, year, yield) %>%
  filter(!is.na(yield))

```


```{r}
corn_2022 <- corn_map |> filter(year == 2022)

pal_county <- colorNumeric(
  palette  = "YlOrRd",
  domain   = corn_2022$yield,
  na.color = "#d0d0d0"
)

leaflet(corn_2022) |>
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) |>
  addPolygons(
    fillColor    = ~pal_county(yield),
    fillOpacity  = 0.85,
    color        = "white",
    weight       = 0.5,
    label        = ~paste0(NAME, ", ", state_abbr, ": ", round(yield, 1), " bu/acre"),
    labelOptions = labelOptions(textsize = "11px")
  ) |>
  addLegend(
    position = "bottomright",
    pal      = pal_county,
    values   = ~yield,
    title    = "Corn Yield (bu/acre)<br><small>2022 · RMA</small>",
    opacity  = 1
  )
```

## Interpolate missing counties

```{r interpolate-adjacent-counties}
# Counties in included states that border yield counties but have no yield data
included_states <- corn_map_states |> st_drop_geometry() |> distinct(state_abbr) |> pull()

state_counties <- counties |>
  filter(STUSPS %in% included_states) |>
  st_transform(4326)

yield_counties <- corn_map_states |>
  group_by(GEOID) |>
  slice(1) |>
  ungroup()

adj_touches <- st_touches(state_counties, yield_counties, sparse = TRUE)

adjacent_no_yield <- state_counties |>
  filter(
    !(GEOID %in% yield_counties$GEOID),
    lengths(adj_touches[seq_len(nrow(state_counties))]) > 0
  )

# Recompute touches between the 187 no-yield counties and yield counties
adj_yield_touches <- st_touches(adjacent_no_yield, yield_counties, sparse = TRUE)

neighbor_geoids <- map(adj_yield_touches, \(idx) yield_counties$GEOID[idx])

# Average neighbor yields per year (neighbor-averaging IDW with equal weights)
adj_interp <- tibble(
  GEOID          = rep(adjacent_no_yield$GEOID, lengths(neighbor_geoids)),
  neighbor_GEOID = unlist(neighbor_geoids)
) |>
  left_join(
    corn_map_states |> st_drop_geometry() |> select(GEOID, year, yield),
    by = c("neighbor_GEOID" = "GEOID"),
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) |>
  group_by(GEOID, year) |>
  summarise(yield = mean(yield, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  left_join(
    adjacent_no_yield |> st_drop_geometry() |> select(GEOID, NAME, STUSPS),
    by = "GEOID"
  ) |>
  rename(state_abbr = STUSPS)

# Attach geometry and combine with original yield counties
adj_interp_sf <- adjacent_no_yield |>
  select(GEOID) |>
  right_join(adj_interp, by = "GEOID")

corn_map_augmented <- bind_rows(
  corn_map_states |> select(GEOID, NAME, state_abbr, year, yield),
  adj_interp_sf   |> select(GEOID, NAME, state_abbr, year, yield)
)
```

```{r}
corn_aug_2022 <- corn_map_augmented |> filter(year == 2022)

pal_county_aug <- colorNumeric(
  palette  = "YlOrRd",
  domain   = corn_aug_2022$yield,
  na.color = "#d0d0d0"
)

leaflet(corn_aug_2022) |>
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) |>
  addPolygons(
    fillColor    = ~pal_county_aug(yield),
    fillOpacity  = 0.85,
    color        = "white",
    weight       = 0.5,
    label        = ~paste0(NAME, ", ", state_abbr, ": ", round(yield, 1), " bu/acre"),
    labelOptions = labelOptions(textsize = "11px")
  ) |>
  addLegend(
    position = "bottomright",
    pal      = pal_county_aug,
    values   = ~yield,
    title    = "Corn Yield (bu/acre)<br><small>2022 · RMA</small>",
    opacity  = 1
  )
```

```{r}
write.csv(corn_map_augmented, "rma_interpolated_yields.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
